member_status_code.text: สถานะสมาชิก

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as mem_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no , sc_mem_m_member_address.moo , sc_mem_m_member_address.road , sc_mem_m_member_address.soi
, ( select subdistrict_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_subdistrict where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_ucf_subdistrict.subdistrict_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol and sc_mem_m_ucf_subdistrict.district_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) AS tambol_name
, ( select district_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_district where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) AS district_name
, ( select province_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_province where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) AS province_name
, sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode , sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_member_address
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '1' /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
